findings.title: Houthis warn of Red Sea intervention if Iran attacked
findings.summary: Iran-backed Houthis issued a military intervention warning if regional states ally against Iran, Red Sea used for hostilities, or escalation against Axis of Resistance continues. This escalates I1 rhetoric intensity amid Iran regional tensions. Direction: escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: Houthis will intervene militarily if regional countries ally with US/Israel against Iran, Red Sea used for hostile ops, or escalation against Iran/Axis continues.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Heightens risk of Red Sea chokepoint disruption tied to broader Iran conflict.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple references in Tier 1 source to recent Houthi statements.

sources_cited.excerpt: Houthis issued warning amid heightened tensions in Bab al-Mandeb.
Houthis fired anti-ship missiles at US Navy vessels previously.

findings.title: Iran presses Houthis for renewed Red Sea shipping attacks
findings.summary: Iran reportedly urging Houthis to resume attacks on Red Sea shipping if US escalates against Iran, despite internal Houthi divisions. Affects I2 military posture in Iran theatre. Direction: escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: Iran pushing Houthis toward Red Sea attacks if US escalates; potential US move on Kharg Island could destabilize energy markets.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Proxy activation risks global trade and energy supply shocks.
findings.confidence_basis: Single detailed report from European sources via Tier 1.

sources_cited.excerpt: Iran pressing Houthis per European sources; Kharg Island threat noted.

findings.title: Sudan economic/food systems collapse drives hunger crisis

findings.claim_excerpt: Economic, health and food systems completely collapsed; widespread hunger and disease.
